chunks.title: Call to Worship and Historical Testimony
chunks.reason: The psalm opens with a call for musical praise and recalls God's deliverance of Israel from Egypt.

chunks.title: God's Rebuke and Consequence
chunks.reason: God speaks directly to the people, reminding them of His law and their refusal to obey.

chunks.title: Promise of Blessing for Obedience
chunks.reason: The passage concludes with a conditional promise of victory and provision if the people return to God.
